title: athyrium neglectum
intro: Athyrium neglectum, also known as Lady Fern, is a type of delicate and elegant fern native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Athyrium neglectum include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Athyrium neglectum is typically harvested in the spring and used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
